response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document is almost certainly fabricated: the conclusions directly contradict the well-established scientific consensus (including prior *Educational Psychology Review* publications) that learning-styles-matched instruction has no reliable empirical support, the reported effect size (d = 0.62) is implausibly large and inconsistent with the existing literature, the DOI format is non-standard for a real 2025 Springer article of this type, and no such meta-analysis by van Berg, Kowalski & Wright exists in any verifiable academic record.
